Module 11 - Lesson 2
What To Focus Your Testing On And Why:
• The Offer!
• The Headline!
• The Big Idea/Premise
“Focus On The Things That Scream, Not On The Things That Whisper!”
*Your Testing Should Begin In The Order Of Priority Above
